message:
feat: redesign hero section with enhanced visual hierarchy

Complete hero section redesign focused on visual impact and readability:

LAYOUT & STRUCTURE:
- Removed complex gradient background layers, simplified to clean bg-slate-950
- Added separate background gradient div for depth (from/via/to slate-950 variants)
- Increased spacing: gap-8→gap-8/12, pb/pt-14→pb/pt-14/20/24 progression
- More generous space-y: 6→8 for better content separation
- Added lg:pl-10 to 3D scene container for better desktop balance

HEADSHOT & BRANDING:
- Enhanced blur glow: -inset-2→-inset-3, blur-2xl→blur-3xl
- Adjusted glow opacity: /30→/20 for subtlety
- Refined border: border-slate-700/60→border-slate-800/80
- Updated shadow: shadow-lg→shadow-2xl with adjusted opacity
- Changed ring: ring-sky-500/20→ring-white/10 for cleaner look
- Floating chip refinements:
  * Border: sky-500/40→sky-500/30
  * Background: sky-500/10→sky-500/5 (more subtle)
  * Font: semibold→bold
  * Added glow: shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(56,189,248,0.15)]
  * Pulsing dot glow: shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(52,211,153,0.6)]

TYPOGRAPHY HIERARCHY:
- Headline (h1) dramatic size increase:
  * text-3xl/4xl/5xl → text-4xl/5xl/6xl
  * font-semibold → font-bold
  * leading-tight → leading-[1.1] (tighter for impact)
- Wrapped headline and body in space-y-6 container
- Body text improvements:
  * text-sm/base → text-base/lg
  * Added leading-relaxed for better readability
  * Color: text-slate-300 → text-slate-300/90
  * Individual paragraph animations (staggered delays)
- Removed redundant tagline paragraph (streamlined content)

ANIMATION REFINEMENTS:
- Headshot container: scale-0.9→1 spring animation (duration 0.8s)
- Headline: y-16→y-20 with spring (stiffness 100, damping 20, delay 0.1)
- Body paragraphs: Individual motion with staggered delays (0.2 + i*0.1)
- CTA container: New animation (y-10, delay 0.4)
- Removed scroll hint animation (cleaner design)

CALL-TO-ACTION REDESIGN:
Primary CTA (Consulting):
- Larger padding: px-5/py-2→px-8/py-3.5
- font-semibold→font-bold
- Enhanced shadow: shadow-lg/sky-500/40→shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba...]
- Hover shadow: shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba...]
- Added active:scale-[0.98] for press feedback
- Grouped icon+text+arrow in relative z-10 span
- Arrow transition: group-hover:translate-x-1
- Larger arrow: h-3/w-3→h-4/w-4

Secondary CTA (Writing):
- Larger padding: px-4/py-2→px-6/py-3.5
- font-medium→font-semibold
- Border: slate-700/80→slate-700/60
- Background: slate-950/70→slate-900/40 with backdrop-blur-sm
- Hover: hover:bg-slate-800/60 with hover:text-white
- Added active:scale-[0.98]
- Icon color transitions: text-slate-400→slate-300 on hover
- Text sizes: xs/sm→sm

CTA Container:
- Gap: gap-3/sm:gap-4→gap-4 (consistent)
- Spacing: pt-2→pt-2 (no change to maintain)

STATS SECTION:
- Increased top spacing: pt-4/md:pt-6→pt-8/md:pt-10
- Better visual separation from CTAs

3D SCENE CONTAINER:
- Border: slate-800/90→slate-800/80
- Background: bg-slate-950→bg-slate-950/80 (semi-transparent)
- Shadow: shadow-[0_40px_120px...]→shadow-2xl/black/50
- Ring: ring-sky-500/10→ring-white/5
- Added backdrop-blur-sm for depth effect

Impact Summary:

VISUAL HIERARCHY:
- Much larger headline draws immediate attention (6xl on desktop)
- Better spacing creates clear content zones
- Simplified background reduces visual noise
- Enhanced shadows and glows add depth without clutter

READABILITY:
- Larger body text (base→lg) improves scanning
- Relaxed leading reduces eye strain
- Staggered animations guide eye through content
- Better contrast with refined color opacities

INTERACTIVITY:
- Enhanced CTA prominence with larger size and shadows
- Active states provide tactile feedback
- Hover animations communicate interactivity
- Smooth spring animations feel premium

PROFESSIONAL POLISH:
- Subtle glows and shadows add depth
- Consistent spacing rhythm throughout
- Clean, modern aesthetic
- Desktop-optimized with responsive scaling

Technical Implementation:
- All animations use Framer Motion with optimized springs
- Staggered delays create natural reading flow
- Active states use transform for GPU acceleration
- Backdrop blur adds premium feel without performance cost
- Responsive breakpoints maintain hierarchy at all sizes
